snippets:
[// === Greek Letters ===
{trigger: "alpha", replacement: "\\alpha", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "beta", replacement: "\\beta", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "gamma", replacement: "\\gamma", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Gamma", replacement: "\\Gamma", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "delta", replacement: "\\delta", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Delta", replacement: "\\Delta", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "eps", replacement: "\\epsilon", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "veps", replacement: "\\varepsilon", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "zeta", replacement: "\\zeta", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "eta", replacement: "\\eta", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "theta", replacement: "\\theta", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Theta", replacement: "\\Theta", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "iota", replacement: "\\iota", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "kappa", replacement: "\\kappa", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "lam", replacement: "\\lambda", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Lam", replacement: "\\Lambda", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "mu", replacement: "\\mu", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "nu", replacement: "\\nu", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "xi", replacement: "\\xi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Xi", replacement: "\\Xi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pi", replacement: "\\pi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Pi", replacement: "\\Pi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "rho", replacement: "\\rho", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sigma", replacement: "\\sigma", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Sigma", replacement: "\\Sigma", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "tau", replacement: "\\tau", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "upsilon", replacement: "\\upsilon", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "phi", replacement: "\\phi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "vphi", replacement: "\\varphi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Phi", replacement: "\\Phi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "chi", replacement: "\\chi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "psi", replacement: "\\psi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Psi", replacement: "\\Psi", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "omega", replacement: "\\omega", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Omega", replacement: "\\Omega", options: "mA"},

// === Superscripts & Subscripts ===
{trigger: "([a-zA-Z])(\\d)", replacement: "[[0]]_[[1]]", options: "mA", description: "Auto subscript"},
{trigger: "([a-zA-Z])_(\\d\\d)", replacement: "[[0]]_{[[1]]}", options: "mA", description: "Auto subscript 2-digit"},
{trigger: "td", replacement: "^{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sq", replacement: "^{2}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "cb", replacement: "^{3}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "inv", replacement: "^{-1}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "T", replacement: "^{T}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "star", replacement: "^{*}", options: "mA"},

// === Fractions ===
{trigger: "//", replacement: "\\frac{$0}{$1}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/", replacement: "\\frac{[[0]]}{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "\\b(\\d+)\\/(\\d+)\\b", replacement: "\\frac{[[0]]}{[[1]]}", options: "mA"},

// === Brackets ===
{trigger: "lp", replacement: "\\left( $0 \\right)", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "lb", replacement: "\\left[ $0 \\right]", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "lc", replacement: "\\left\\{ $0 \\right\\}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "la", replacement: "\\left\\langle $0 \\right\\rangle", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "abs", replacement: "\\left| $0 \\right|", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "norm", replacement: "\\left\\| $0 \\right\\|", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "ceil", replacement: "\\left\\lceil $0 \\right\\rceil", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "floor", replacement: "\\left\\lfloor $0 \\right\\rfloor", options: "mA"},

// === Operators ===
{trigger: "grad", replacement: "\\nabla", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "nab", replacement: "\\nabla", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "div", replacement: "\\nabla \\cdot", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "curl", replacement: "\\nabla \\times", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "lap", replacement: "\\Delta", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pd", replacement: "\\partial", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pdx", replacement: "\\frac{\\partial $0}{\\partial x}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pdt", replacement: "\\frac{\\partial $0}{\\partial t}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pdn", replacement: "\\frac{\\partial $0}{\\partial $1}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pd2", replacement: "\\frac{\\partial^2 $0}{\\partial $1^2}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pdxy", replacement: "\\frac{\\partial^2 $0}{\\partial x \\partial y}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "dd", replacement: "\\frac{d $0}{d $1}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "ddt", replacement: "\\frac{d}{dt}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "d2t", replacement: "\\frac{d^2}{dt^2}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Dt", replacement: "\\frac{D}{Dt}", options: "mA"},

// === Integrals & Sums ===
{trigger: "int", replacement: "\\int_{$0}^{$1}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "oint", replacement: "\\oint", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "iint", replacement: "\\iint", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "iiint", replacement: "\\iiint", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sum", replacement: "\\sum_{$0}^{$1}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "prod", replacement: "\\prod_{$0}^{$1}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "lim", replacement: "\\lim_{$0 \\to $1}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "limsup", replacement: "\\limsup_{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "liminf", replacement: "\\liminf_{$0}", options: "mA"},

// === Arrows ===
{trigger: "->", replacement: "\\to", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "=>", replacement: "\\Rightarrow", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "<=>", replacement: "\\Leftrightarrow", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "<-", replacement: "\\leftarrow", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "iff", replacement: "\\iff", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "impl", replacement: "\\implies", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "maps", replacement: "\\mapsto", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "hookr", replacement: "\\hookrightarrow", options: "mA"},

// === Relations ===
{trigger: "leq", replacement: "\\leq", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "geq", replacement: "\\geq", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "neq", replacement: "\\neq", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "approx", replacement: "\\approx", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sim", replacement: "\\sim", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "simeq", replacement: "\\simeq", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "cong", replacement: "\\cong", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "ll", replacement: "\\ll", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "gg", replacement: "\\gg", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "prec", replacement: "\\prec", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "preceq", replacement: "\\preceq", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "succ", replacement: "\\succ", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "succeq", replacement: "\\succeq", options: "mA"},

// === Set Theory ===
{trigger: "in", replacement: "\\in", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "nin", replacement: "\\notin", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sub", replacement: "\\subset", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sube", replacement: "\\subseteq", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sup", replacement: "\\supset", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "cup", replacement: "\\cup", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "cap", replacement: "\\cap", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "setm", replacement: "\\setminus", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "empty", replacement: "\\emptyset", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "RR", replacement: "\\mathbb{R}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "NN", replacement: "\\mathbb{N}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "ZZ", replacement: "\\mathbb{Z}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "QQ", replacement: "\\mathbb{Q}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "CC", replacement: "\\mathbb{C}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "FF", replacement: "\\mathbb{F}", options: "mA"},

// === Logic ===
{trigger: "forall", replacement: "\\forall", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "exists", replacement: "\\exists", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "nexists", replacement: "\\nexists", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "and", replacement: "\\land", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "or", replacement: "\\lor", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "not", replacement: "\\lnot", options: "mA"},

// === Linear Algebra ===
{trigger: "mat", replacement: "\\begin{pmatrix} $0 \\end{pmatrix}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "bmat", replacement: "\\begin{bmatrix} $0 \\end{bmatrix}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "det", replacement: "\\det", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "tr", replacement: "\\operatorname{tr}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "rank", replacement: "\\operatorname{rank}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "span", replacement: "\\operatorname{span}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "ker", replacement: "\\ker", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "img", replacement: "\\operatorname{Im}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "ip", replacement: "\\langle $0, $1 \\rangle", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "otimes", replacement: "\\otimes", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "oplus", replacement: "\\oplus", options: "mA"},

// === Analysis & Functional Analysis ===
{trigger: "inf", replacement: "\\inf", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sup2", replacement: "\\sup", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "max", replacement: "\\max", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "min", replacement: "\\min", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "to", replacement: "\\to", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "conv", replacement: "\\to", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "wto", replacement: "\\rightharpoonup", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "starto", replacement: "\\overset{*}{\\rightharpoonup}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Lp", replacement: "L^{$0}(\\Omega)", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Hs", replacement: "H^{$0}(\\Omega)", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "W1p", replacement: "W^{1,$0}(\\Omega)", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "sob", replacement: "H^1_0(\\Omega)", options: "mA"},

// === Optimization ===
{trigger: "argmin", replacement: "\\operatorname*{arg\\,min}_{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "argmax", replacement: "\\operatorname*{arg\\,max}_{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "prox", replacement: "\\operatorname{prox}_{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "proj", replacement: "\\operatorname{proj}_{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "dom", replacement: "\\operatorname{dom}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "epi", replacement: "\\operatorname{epi}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "conv2", replacement: "\\operatorname{conv}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "subdiff", replacement: "\\partial", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "Lip", replacement: "\\operatorname{Lip}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "st", replacement: "\\text{s.t.}\\quad", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "minimize", replacement: "\\underset{$0}{\\text{minimize}}\\quad", options: "mA"},

// === Misc ===
{trigger: "...", replacement: "\\ldots", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "cdots", replacement: "\\cdots", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "vdots", replacement: "\\vdots", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "ddots", replacement: "\\ddots", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pm", replacement: "\\pm", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "mp", replacement: "\\mp", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "times", replacement: "\\times", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "cdot", replacement: "\\cdot", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "infty", replacement: "\\infty", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "O(", replacement: "\\mathcal{O}($0)", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "cal", replacement: "\\mathcal{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "bb", replacement: "\\mathbb{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "bf", replacement: "\\mathbf{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "hat", replacement: "\\hat{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "bar", replacement: "\\bar{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "tilde", replacement: "\\tilde{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "dot", replacement: "\\dot{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "ddot", replacement: "\\ddot{$0}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "vec", replacement: "\\vec{$0}", options: "mA"},

// === Environments ===
{trigger: "ali", replacement: "\\begin{align*}\n$0\n\\end{align*}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "cases", replacement: "\\begin{cases}\n$0 & \\text{if } $1 \\\\\\\\\n$2 & \\text{otherwise}\n\\end{cases}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "pmat", replacement: "\\begin{pmatrix}\n$0\n\\end{pmatrix}", options: "mA"},
{trigger: "bmat2", replacement: "\\begin{bmatrix}\n$0\n\\end{bmatrix}", options: "mA"},
]
